title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Yamato, Oden, Kaido as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.text: The devil that trying to escape our grasp.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one who emulates Kozuki Oden! Check out Yamato's concept art!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were many conflicting ideas for YAMato. This led to a wide value of alternate designs, hairstyles and outfits included. Let's see how these planned versions differ from the YAMato we know today.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While Yamato now uses a weapon like Kaido's, this wasn't always the intent. Here we can see a Katana being used instead. Its sharp coolness leaves a lasting impression! Could this be an attempt to be a Samura! Like oden?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first morning of different expressions that seem a lot more straightforward and serious. Could this version be a tsundere?!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 15 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
